required_question: Is the thermal claim stated in one sentence?
Are all A1-A3 inputs named with file/source/date?
Are spatial temporal climate service occupant and excluded boundaries stated?
Can another reader identify the tools settings and output files?
Are thresholds justified instead of hidden?
Can a reader reproduce the main plot or table?
Is the changed assumption named and result labeled robust weakened censored or unsupported?
Does the capsule say what the evidence cannot prove?
